name: Emon.rsus
title: Surface Upwelling Shortwave Radiation over Land
description: Surface Upwelling Shortwave Radiation over land. Can be used for computation of surface albedo.
processing note: This quantity is necessary to derive fluxes and albedo over portions of land grid cells that are snow-free or ice-free (see https://github.com/CMIP-Data-Request/Harmonised-Public-Consultation/issues/90#issuecomment-3323267867)
